suppress.notes: CVE-2026-53914 ("code execution via unsafe deserialization in the build cache metadata") is about JetBrains Kotlin's compiler/Gradle-plugin build-cache mechanism - a build-time attack surface. kotlin-stdlib here is a transitive *runtime* dependency (pulled in by okhttp -> okio, itself pulled in by the OTLP/Firebase SDKs), never invoked as part of any Kotlin build tooling in this project (build.gradle is Groovy, not Kotlin DSL). JetBrains' own CVSS assessment (6.7, local/high-privilege access) is consistent with this; NIST's 9.8 reflects the build-tooling scenario this deployment never exercises. Confirmed against the NVD record on 2026-07-13.
